title: Trichomanes franceae
taxonomy: Trichomanes franceae is classified as a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. This family is part of the larger group of vascular plants known as Pteridophyta. Hymenophyllaceae is a family of filmy ferns that are mostly epiphytic and have delicate fronds. Trichomanes franceae is native to tropical Asia and is known for its unique growth habits and adaptations to its environment. As a member of the Hymenophyllaceae family, Trichomanes franceae has evolved to thrive in a variety of ecological niches.
